case_title: 1650 JACKSON STREET CONDOMINUM OWNERS ASSOC. VS. RICHARD MONTOYA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE CHARGED $30.00 SERVED SEP-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1650 JACKSON STREET CONDOMINUM OWNERS ASSOC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1650 JACKSON STREET CONDOMINUM OWNERS ASSOC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONTOYA, RICHARD THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND TO, AND PAYMENT FROM ESCROW COMPRISES AN ACCORD AND SATISFACTION OF DEFENDANT'S OBLIGATION TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,959.87 FILED BY 1650 JACKSON STREET CONDOMINUM OWNERS ASSOC. AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
